results.name: Chase Sapphire Preferred® Card
results.rewards_rate: 5x on travel purchased through Chase Travel℠, 3x on dining, select streaming services and online groceries, 2x on all other travel purchases, 1x on all other purchases. Points
results.signup_bonus: Earn 60,000 bonus points after you spend $4,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening. That’s $750 when you redeem through Chase Travel℠.

results.name: Capital One Venture Rewards Credit Card
results.rewards_rate: 2 Miles per dollar on every purchase, every day. 5 Miles per dollar on hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel.
results.signup_bonus: Earn 75,000 bonus miles once you spend $4,000 on purchases within the first 3 months from account opening.

results.name: American Express Platinum Card®
results.rewards_rate: 5x Membership Rewards® points on flights booked directly with airlines or with American Express Travel and prepaid hotels booked on amextravel.com, 1x points on other eligible purchases.
results.signup_bonus: Earn 80,000 Membership Rewards® Points after you spend $8,000 on purchases on the Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership.

results.name: Capital One Venture X Rewards Credit Card
results.rewards_rate: 10 Miles per dollar on hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel, 5 Miles per dollar on flights booked through Capital One Travel, 2 Miles per dollar on other purchases.
results.signup_bonus: Earn 75,000 miles when you spend $4,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

results.name: Chase Sapphire Reserve®
results.rewards_rate: 10x on hotels and car rentals purchased through Chase Travel℠, 5x on flights purchased through Chase Travel℠, 3x on other travel worldwide, 3x on dining at restaurants including eligible delivery services, takeout and dining out, 1x on all other purchases.
results.signup_bonus: Earn 60,000 bonus points after you spend $4,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening. That’s $900 toward travel when you redeem through Chase Travel℠.
